headline: PBF Energy Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PBF narrows its Q1 loss despite higher costs, as strong refining margins and throughput growth drive a revenue beat and an operational turnaround.

headline: Pain At The Pump: Top Energy Stocks To Buy Now As Gas Prices Surge 40% - Profit Like It's 2022
